name: Tear Corporation
summary: Tear Corporation provides funeral services in Japan. The company operates funeral centers primarily in Chubu, Kansai, and Kanto districts. It also offers subcontracting funeral and legal requirements at the hall, as well as funeral and legal requirements at temples, private homes, and public places; and follow-ups according to the consultation content of the bereaved families. Tear Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
